contextBlurb: Prince Edward Island's housing policy is guided by the Building Together – PEI Housing Strategy 2024-2026, with a CMHC-PEI Three Year Action Plan (2026-2028) directing provincial and federal investments toward affordable housing. The 2026 Capital Budget allocated $128.3 million for affordable public housing, while the broader Budget 2026 includes $34.6 million in housing supports such as rent supplements, mobile rental vouchers, and transitional housing. Key programs include the Affordable Housing Development Program offering forgivable loans of up to $55,000 per unit.

legislation.title: Housing Corporation Act – Funding Agreement with PEI Community Housing Development Inc.
legislation.summary: An Order in Council under the Housing Corporation Act establishing a funding agreement with PEI Community Housing Development Inc. to support community housing development.

legislation.title: Housing Corporation Act – Funding Agreement with PEI Community Housing Development Inc.
legislation.summary: An Order in Council under the Housing Corporation Act establishing a funding agreement with PEI Community Housing Development Inc. to support community-based housing development.

legislation.title: Building Together – Prince Edward Island Housing Strategy 2024-2026
legislation.summary: A multi-year provincial housing strategy focused on accelerating housing supply, affordability, and infrastructure, with progress reported annually.
